mapper.select: SELECT m.*, fu.username as from_username, fu.avatar as from_user_avatar, tu.username as to_username, tu.avatar as to_user_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user fu ON m.from_user_id = fu.id LEFT JOIN user tu ON m.to_user_id = tu.id WHERE m.to_user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
